data.title: Venezuela Shows Why Stablecoins Matter When Fiat Breaks – Here Is Why USDT Keeps Winning
data.description:
Venezuela serves as a compelling case study that highlights the critical importance of stablecoins in times of economic instability, particularly when a country’s fiat currency experiences severe devaluation. The ongoing crisis in Venezuela, marked by hyperinflation and a lack of faith in the national currency, underscores the advantages that stablecoins offer as reliable alternatives for preserving value and facilitating transactions. In this context, Tether (USDT) continues to gain traction and demonstrates resilience as a leading stablecoin. Here’s an in-depth exploration of the reasons behind USDT's continual success in the market, even amid challenging economic circumstances, and why its role has become increasingly vital for users seeking stability.
source: https://blocknews.com/venezuela-shows-why-stablecoins-matter-when-fiat-breaks-here-is-why-usdt-keep-winning/

data.title: China Telecom develops MoE AI models exclusively on Huawei Chips
data.description:
China Telecom has developed the country’s first artificial intelligence models with the innovative Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture that are trained entirely on advanced chips from Huawei Technologies. According to a technical paper published last month by China Telecom’s Institute of Artificial Intelligence (TeleAI), the TeleChat3 models, ranging from 105 billion to trillions of parameters, were trained […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-telecom-develops-moe-ai-huawei-chips/

data.title: Cryptocurrency Scams Lead to $17 Billion in Losses
data.description: Fraudsters have stolen $17 billion through cryptocurrency scams using advanced methods such as mass text messaging and EZ-Pass phishing. According to NS3.AI, these scams are increasingly sophisticated, leveraging technologies like crypto and AI to deceive victims. The bulk of these fraudulent activities have been linked primarily to perpetrators based in China.

data.title: Russia Implements AI-Powered Censorship to Restrict VPN and Crypto Access
data.description: Russia has initiated a $29 million artificial intelligence-driven censorship program aimed at curbing VPN usage and blocking access to foreign cryptocurrency platforms. According to NS3.AI, this development poses a significant threat to Russian users' ability to access overseas crypto exchanges, mining pools, and information services. Experts caution that this intensified control over online crypto infrastructure by Moscow could lead to increased instability and limit participation in the crypto market.

data.title: Amazon Faces Stock Decline Amid Tariff Concerns and AI Growth Prospects
data.description: Amazon's stock has experienced a decline following CEO Andy Jassy's warning about the impact of U.S. tariffs on product prices on its platform. According to NS3.AI, despite these challenges, consumer demand has shown resilience, with cautious spending on non-essential items. The company continues to see strong growth prospects driven by investments in artificial intelligence and its AWS cloud services. Analysts maintain a generally optimistic outlook, with price targets indicating potential for growth, although the recent tariff pressures present short-term uncertainties.
